message:
feat(workspace): extract frankenterm-core-audit-types leaf crate (ft-rqu5e / ft-8nqx0 Phase 1)

Phase 1 of the staged extraction proposed in
`docs/proposals/ft-8nqx0-audit-operational-boundary.md`. Lifts the
cleanest, zero-`crate::*`-dep audit / forensic / evidence DTOs out of
`frankenterm-core` into a new leaf crate so portable evidence types
stop living next to operational runtime, recorder, policy, storage,
and crash modules.

New crate `crates/frankenterm-core-audit-types/`:

- `forensic_export` — canonical forensic records and the query/export
  model used for compliance reconstruction. ~1,099 LOC, leaf-clean per
  the ft-8nqx0 boundary scan (only `std` + `serde` imports).
- `traceability_verification` — static traceability matrix
  verification types, gap/coverage analytics. ~1,458 LOC, also
  leaf-clean per the boundary scan.
- `policy_decision_log_engine` — generic bounded decision-log mechanics
  (DecisionLogConfig, DecisionLogSnapshot, append/evict/export) carved
  out from `policy_decision_log.rs` so the engine no longer depends on
  policy enums or redaction internals. The policy-coupled
  `PolicyDecisionEntry`, `DecisionOutcome`, and the Redactor wiring
  stay in `frankenterm-core::policy_decision_log`, which now imports
  the engine via the leaf crate.
- `recorder_audit_engine` — generic recorder-audit hash-chain engine
  (bounded in-memory retention, ordinal assignment, chain
  verification) without `frankenterm-core` recorder storage or policy
  deps. Pre-seed for ft-kldww Phase 2.

Workspace wiring (`Cargo.toml`):

- New member `crates/frankenterm-core-audit-types`.
- `frankenterm-core` declares `frankenterm-core-audit-types` as a
  path dep.

Re-export contract preserved (`crates/frankenterm-core/src/lib.rs`):

- `pub use frankenterm_core_audit_types::forensic_export;` and
  `pub use frankenterm_core_audit_types::traceability_verification;`
  so `crate::forensic_export::*` /
  `frankenterm_core::forensic_export::*` and the matching
  `traceability_verification` paths continue to resolve unchanged.
  All existing call sites (proptest_forensic_export,
  proptest_traceability_verification, internal references) need zero
  edits.
- The original `forensic_export.rs` and `traceability_verification.rs`
  files in `crates/frankenterm-core/src/` are deleted to avoid
  duplicate-definition drift.

Verification:

- `cargo check -p frankenterm-core-audit-types` → clean.
- `cargo check -p frankenterm-core --no-default-features` → clean.
- `cargo check --workspace` (default features) → clean.
- `cargo check -p frankenterm-core --test proptest_forensic_export
  --test proptest_traceability_verification --no-default-features` →
  clean (proptests still resolve via re-export).

Phase 2+ deferred to existing follow-on beads ft-kldww (audit
engines), ft-mq7fl (forensics+rehearsal), ft-xcsm0 (retention),
ft-4ses2 (storage audit boundary), ft-nsoxc (ARS decoupling). The
`policy_decision_log_engine` and `recorder_audit_engine` modules in
this crate are pre-seeds for the ft-kldww work — Phase 2 will fully
wire `recorder_audit.rs` to the engine and remove the operational
deps that currently keep it in core.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,19 @@
+[package]
+name = "frankenterm-core-audit-types"
+description = "Audit / forensic / evidence DTOs extracted from frankenterm-core (ft-rqu5e / ft-8nqx0)"
+version.workspace = true
+edition.workspace = true
+rust-version.workspace = true
+authors.workspace = true
+license-file.workspace = true
+repository.workspace = true
+readme = "../../README.md"
+keywords = ["terminal", "frankenterm", "audit", "forensics"]
+categories = ["development-tools"]
+
+[lints]
+workspace = true
+
+[dependencies]
+serde = { workspace = true, features = ["derive", "std", "alloc"] }
+serde_json.workspace = true

@@ -0,0 +1,45 @@
+//! `frankenterm-core-audit-types` — audit / forensic / evidence DTOs leaf
+//! crate (ft-rqu5e / ft-8nqx0 Phase 1).
+//!
+//! Phase 1 of the staged extraction proposed in
+//! `docs/proposals/ft-8nqx0-audit-operational-boundary.md`. This crate
+//! holds the cleanest, zero-`crate::*`-dep DTO clusters identified in
+//! that audit so portable evidence types stop living next to operational
+//! runtime, recorder, policy, storage, and crash modules.
+//!
+//! Modules in this crate (current beachhead set):
+//!
+//! - [`forensic_export`] — canonical forensic records and the
+//!   query/export model used for compliance reconstruction.
+//! - [`traceability_verification`] — static traceability matrix
+//!   verification types and gap/coverage analytics.
+//!
+//! Both modules are leaf-clean (only `std` + `serde` imports) per the
+//! ft-8nqx0 boundary scan, which is what makes them safe to lift in
+//! Phase 1 without a parallel API redesign in their callers.
+//!
+//! ## What stays in `frankenterm-core` (for now)
+//!
+//! Phase 2+ of the proposal handles the audit/forensics modules that
+//! still carry cross-cluster `crate::*` deps:
+//!
+//! - `recorder_audit` (depends on policy, recorder_storage, tuning_config)
+//! - `policy_decision_log` (depends on policy + policy_dsl)
+//! - `recorder_retention`, `session_retention` (mixed config + SQL)
+//! - `resize_crash_forensics`, `migration_rehearsal`, `cutover_evidence`,
+//!   `canary_rehearsal`, `bayesian_ledger`, `reports`
+//!
+//! Each gets its own follow-up bead (ft-kldww / ft-mq7fl / ft-xcsm0 /
+//! ft-4ses2 / ft-nsoxc) per the proposal.
+//!
+//! ## Re-export contract
+//!
+//! `frankenterm-core` re-exports both modules via `pub use` so the
+//! public surface (`frankenterm_core::forensic_export::*`,
+//! `frankenterm_core::traceability_verification::*`) is preserved
+//! byte-for-byte — same call sites, same proptests, no API churn.
+
+pub mod forensic_export;
+pub mod policy_decision_log_engine;
+pub mod recorder_audit_engine;
+pub mod traceability_verification;

@@ -27,6 +27,13 @@ frankenterm-alloc.workspace = true
 frankenterm-core-resource-types = { path = "../frankenterm-core-resource-types" }
 frankenterm-core-error-types = { path = "../frankenterm-core-error-types" }
 frankenterm-core-cass-types = { path = "../frankenterm-core-cass-types" }
+# ft-rqu5e / ft-8nqx0 Phase 1: leaf crate for audit / forensic / evidence
+# DTOs (forensic_export + traceability_verification — both confirmed
+# leaf-clean per the ft-8nqx0 boundary scan). Re-exported from
+# `frankenterm-core` so `frankenterm_core::forensic_export::*` and
+# `frankenterm_core::traceability_verification::*` paths continue to
+# resolve unchanged.
+frankenterm-core-audit-types = { path = "../frankenterm-core-audit-types" }
 # ft-2z15d / ft-y0loj.5.D.2: leaf crate of caut wrapper types
 # (CautService / CautUsage / CautRefresh / CautAccountUsage / CautError).
 # Re-exported below from `crate::caut::*` so existing import paths keep
